replies.msg:
一開始P = MR = 100
即係一開始嘅profit maximizing output level係10 units

諗返Profit嘅定義
Profit = TR - TC
TR = P x Q = 100 x 10 = 1000
由於Profit = 350
TC = 650

之後每個unit嘅MC都跌$30, 而market price跌$10, 新嘅profit maximizing output level就會係12 units

根據返profit嘅定義, profit = TR - TC
你要諗change in profit, 就要諗change in TR同change in TC
記得change in Profit = Change in TR - Change in TC

Change in TR同change in TC都可以分開兩部分
第1部分係頭10個units
第2部分係新生產嘅2個units

Change in TR = -$10 × 10 + $90 × 2 = -100 + 180 = 80
Change in TC = -$30 × 10 + ($80 + $90) = -300 + 170 = -130
Change in profit = 80 - (-130) = 80 + 130 = 210

利申: 無睇過大家嘅討論

依題嘅難度其實低過2015年Q5
如果你諗得通2015年Q5咩情況下profit升, 咩情況下profit跌就真係叻。
此回覆已被刪除

profit $350 -> $100*10-C=$350 -> C=$650 (C is the total cost when Q=10)
new Q=12(where MC=$90), new total cost=$650-$30*10+$80(MC when Q=11)+$90=$520
new profit = $90*12-$520 = $560
Ans:B
